title: Privacy Policy
meta: AskBiz POS · AskBiz Ltd · Effective date: 16 June 2026 · Last updated: 16 June 2026
s1_p1: AskBiz POS (pos.askbiz.co) is a point-of-sale, inventory and logistics application operated by AskBiz Ltd (“AskBiz”, “we”, “us”). It is used by business owners to run sales, manage staff, track stock and coordinate deliveries.
s1_p2_controller: The business owner is the data controller
s1_p2_mid: for the staff and customer personal data processed through their POS account — they decide what data is entered and why.
s1_p2_processor: AskBiz acts as the data processor
s1_p2_end: , handling that data only to provide the service on the business owner’s instructions.
s1_p3: For data we collect directly to run our platform (account details, billing, security logs), AskBiz is the controller.
s2_p1_text: Name, email, business type, country, and subscription details when an account is created.
s2_p2_text: Staff names, roles, and PINs used to sign in to the POS. PINs are hashed (bcrypt) and never stored in plain text.
s2_p3_text: Customer names and phone numbers (when provided for receipts or records), and the transaction history linked to them.
s2_p4_text: Products sold, quantities, prices, discounts, payment methods, timestamps, stock levels, and product details.
s2_p5_text: Camera images of products, barcodes, price tags, number plates, and vehicle inspections. Scan images are processed in real time — raw images are not retained on our servers; only the extracted data (e.g. product name, price, plate number) is kept.
s2_p6_text: If the logistics module is used, driver location and delivery routes are processed to track parcels and manage deliveries.
s2_p7_text: Session information, device type, and security logs (e.g. failed login attempts) for fraud prevention.
s2_p8_text1: Your signed-in staff session is stored in your browser’s local storage (key
s2_p8_text2: ) so the POS keeps you logged in. Offline cash sales are also held locally until they sync.
s3_li1: Operating the POS: sales, receipts, inventory and reporting
s3_li2: Authenticating staff and securing the business account
s3_li3: Processing payments via card and mobile money providers
s3_li4: Scanning products, barcodes, price tags and number plates with AI
s3_li5: Managing logistics: parcel tracking, routes, driver location and vehicle inspections
s3_li6: Sending sales receipts via WhatsApp/SMS when a customer opts in
s3_li7: Preventing fraud and abuse, and keeping the service secure
s4_r1_activity: Running the POS service for the business
s5_r1_retention: Retained for accounting/tax compliance (typically 7 years); exportable or deletable on request
s5_r3_retention: Hashed; failed-login logs kept 90 days then deleted
s5_r4_retention: Not stored — processed in real time only
s5_r8_retention: Until synced to server, then cleared locally
s6_p1: You have the right to access, correct, delete, restrict, port, and object to the processing of your personal data, and to withdraw consent at any time. These satisfy EU/UK GDPR and most other applicable privacy laws.
s6_p2_label: If you are a customer or staff member
s6_p2_text: of a business that uses AskBiz POS, that business is the data controller. To access or erase your data, contact the business owner directly — they decide what data is held and can action your request in the POS.
s6_p3_text1: will support any controller in fulfilling these requests, and will action requests relating to data we control (such as account or billing data). Email
s6_p4: You may also lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority.
s7_p1: We use the following sub-processors, each bound by a data processing agreement and appropriate transfer safeguards (Standard Contractual Clauses where data leaves the EU/UK):
s7_li2_text: — AI processing of scan images for product, price-tag and number-plate recognition (USA)
s7_li5_text: — receipt delivery when a customer opts in (USA)
s7_p2: We never sell your data and never share it with advertisers.
s8_p1: We protect data using encrypted connections (TLS), bcrypt-hashed staff PINs, row-level security on our database, and scoped access controls. If a breach occurs that is likely to risk your rights, we notify the relevant authority within 72 hours and affected users without undue delay. Report security concerns to security@askbiz.co.
s9_p1_text: The POS uses minimal essential storage only — it does not run advertising or third-party analytics cookies. See our
s10_p1: We will notify business owners of any material changes to this policy before they take effect. Continued use of AskBiz POS after changes constitutes acceptance.
